description: bundle=separate (3 separate reads, smaller individual reads) - BIG WIN
Q8_0 quantization — slower due to larger weights
COMBO k=7 + 8 threads + 128KB + separate — slower, more RAM
COMBO VRAM 0.3 + k=5 + 8 threads + lookahead 2 — slower
COMBO minimal (k=3, cached=20, prefetch=0) — floor, low RAM
CREATIVE k=3 + 8 prefetch — worse than either alone
CREATIVE k=1 (no window eviction) — lowest RAM
CREATIVE read align 512KB — HUGE WIN, near-sequential NVMe
CREATIVE read align 1MB — no gain over 512KB
CREATIVE read align 2MB — slightly worse than 512KB
CREATIVE cached=40+512KB — HUGE WIN, new best!
CREATIVE k=4+cached=40+512KB+gate_down — separate is far better
